content.text:
VB.NET WinForms 프로젝트 (`LeakTestMachine_신진1`)를 확인했습니다. 주요 폼은 다음과 같습니다:

- **FrmMain** — 메인 폼
- **FrmTest** — 테스트
- **FrmSet** — 설정
- **FrmSeq** — 시퀀스
- **FrmBarcode** — 바코드
- **FrmSignal** — 신호
- **FrmSearch / FrmSearch2** — 검색
- **FrmPart** — 부품
- **FrmPassWord** — 비밀번호
- **Module1** — 공용 모듈

.NET Framework 4.8 기반, Mitsubishi PLC 통신(ACTETHERLib) 및 라벨 프린터(MXLabelMemLib) COM 참조가 포함되어 있습니다.

어떤 작업을 도와드릴까요?

file.content:
# NI 컴포넌트 변환 가이드 (converttp)

MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST 프로젝트에서 실제 수행한 NI/유료 컴포넌트 → 무료 표준 컴포넌트 변환 작업을 다른 프로젝트에도 동일하게 적용하기 위한 참조 문서 모음.

---

## 변환 목록

| 변환 대상 | 기존 (유료/NI) | 교체 (무료/표준) | 문서 |
|-----------|---------------|-----------------|------|
| 실시간 그래프 | NI ScatterGraph | ZedGraph 5.2.x | [NI-ScatterGraph-to-ZedGraph.md](NI-ScatterGraph-to-ZedGraph.md) |
| 스프레드시트 그리드 | FlexCell Grid | DataGridView | [FlexCell-to-DataGridView.md](FlexCell-to-DataGridView.md) |

---

## 파일 구성

```
converttp/
  README.md                        ← 이 파일 (전체 개요)
  NI-ScatterGraph-to-ZedGraph.md   ← NI 그래프 변환 상세 가이드
  FlexCell-to-DataGridView.md      ← FlexCell 그리드 변환 상세 가이드
  DLL-정보.md                      ← DLL 파일 위치 및 NuGet 정보
  ClassZedGraph.vb                 ← 재사용 가능한 ZedGraph 헬퍼 클래스 (복사해서 사용)
```

---

## 변환 원칙

1. **기존 API와 동일한 메서드명으로 래핑** - 호출 코드 최소 변경
2. **시각적 스타일 유지** - 배경/색상/선 두께 동일하게 재현
3. **디자이너 호환 유지** - WinForms Designer에서 컨트롤 배치 가능
4. **라이센스 의존성 완전 제거** - 배포 시 별도 라이센스 불필요

---

## 참조 프로젝트

- **MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST** (`LsuptNoiseTestmx5`)
  - 변환 완료일: 2025-12-19
  - 두 가지 변환 모두 적용 및 빌드 검증 완료

content.text:
확인했습니다. 이전 MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST 프로젝트에서 수행한 NI/유료 컴포넌트 → 무료 컴포넌트 변환 가이드입니다.

**변환 대상 2가지:**
1. **NI ScatterGraph → ZedGraph** (실시간 그래프)
2. **FlexCell Grid → DataGridView** (스프레드시트)

이 가이드를 NoiseTest1(신진) 프로젝트에 동일하게 적용하면 되겠네요. 진행할까요? 그 전에 NoiseTest1에서 NI/FlexCell 컴포넌트가 어떻게 사용되고 있는지 먼저 분석하겠습니다.

message.content: 모든 ni ui 구성부는 제거해줘 코드안에 daqstart 부분 은 명보꺼랑 동일한 방식으로 게더링 하면 됨 . 수정 플랜 우선 적성 flexcell grid 도 일반 grid 로 변환해야함

content.text: 프로젝트 분석을 시작하겠습니다. NI/FlexCell 사용 현황과 변환 가이드, 명보 프로젝트를 동시에 조사합니다.

content.content:
1→# NI ScatterGraph → ZedGraph 변환 가이드
     2→
     3→## 개요
     4→
     5→NI (National Instruments) ScatterGraph 컨트롤을 오픈소스 ZedGraph 라이브러리로 교체하는 방법.
     6→
     7→- **목적**: NI 라이센스 비용 제거, 외부 의존성 없이 배포 가능
     8→- **참조 프로젝트**: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5
     9→- **검증 환경**: VB.NET, .NET Framework 4.0, Windows Forms
    10→
    11→---
    12→
    13→## 1. ZedGraph NuGet 설치
    14→
    15→### packages.config 방식 (.NET Framework 구형 프로젝트)
    16→
    17→`packages.config` 파일 생성 또는 추가:
    18→
    19→```xml
    20→<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
    21→<packages>
    22→  <package id="ZedGraph" version="5.2.0" targetFramework="net40" />
    23→</packages>
    24→```
    25→
    26→### .vbproj 참조 추가
    27→
    28→```xml
    29→<Reference Include="ZedGraph, Version=5.2.0.439, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=02a83cbd123fcd60, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
    30→  <HintPath>..\packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll</HintPath>
    31→</Reference>
    32→```
    33→
    34→> NuGet 패키지 복원 후 `packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll` 생성됨
    35→
    36→### NuGet 글로벌 캐시 위치 (이미 설치된 경우 복사 가능)
    37→
    38→```
    39→C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll  ← .NET 4.0 프로젝트 사용
    40→C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net481\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 4.8.1 이상
    41→C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net6.0\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 6
    42→C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net8.0\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 8
    43→```
    44→
    45→---
    46→
    47→## 2. 프로젝트에서 NI 참조 제거
    48→
    49→.vbproj에서 아래 참조 항목 삭제:
    50→
    51→```xml
    52→<!-- 삭제 대상 -->
    53→<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms" ... />
    54→<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.UI" ... />
    55→<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.Common" ... />
    56→<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.DAQmx" ... />
    57→```
    58→
    59→---
    60→
    61→## 3. Designer.vb 수정
    62→
    63→### 기존 NI ScatterGraph 선언 (삭제)
    64→
    65→```vb
    66→Friend WithEvents gLGraphAmp As NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms.ScatterGraph
    67→```
    68→
    69→### ZedGraph 컨트롤로 교체
    70→
    71→```vb
    72→Friend WithEvents gLGraphAmp As ZedGraph.ZedGraphControl
    73→```
    74→
    75→### InitializeComponent 내 변경
    76→
    77→```vb
    78→' 기존 NI 방식 (삭제)
    79→Me.gLGraphAmp = New NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms.ScatterGraph()
    80→Me.gLGraphAmp.Cursors.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.ScatterGraphCursor())
    81→Me.gLGraphAmp.Plots.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.ScatterPlot())
    82→Me.gLGraphAmp.XAxes.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.XAxis())
    83→Me.gLGraphAmp.YAxes.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.YAxis())
    84→Me.gLGraphAmp.Annotations.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.XyPointAnnotation())
    85→
    86→' 새 ZedGraph 방식
    87→Me.gLGraphAmp = New ZedGraph.ZedGraphControl()
    88→Me.gLGraphAmp.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(x, y)
    89→Me.gLGraphAmp.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(w, h)
    90→Me.gLGraphAmp.TabIndex = 0
    91→Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollGrace = 0
    92→Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMaxX = 0
    93→Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMaxY = 0
    94→Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMinX = 0
    95→Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMinY = 0
    96→```
    97→
    98→---
    99→
   100→## 4. ClassZedGraph.vb 추가 (헬퍼 클래스)
   101→
   102→`ClassZedGraph.vb` 파일을 프로젝트에 추가한다. (이 폴더의 `ClassZedGraph.vb` 참조)
   103→
   104→이 클래스는 NI ScatterGraph의 API 패턴을 그대로 유지하면서 ZedGraph로 구현:
   105→
   106→| NI ScatterGraph 메서드 | ClassZedGraph 대체 메서드 |
   107→|------------------------|--------------------------|
   108→| `PlotXYAppend(series, x, y)` | `ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(zg, series, y, x)` |
   109→| `PlotXY(xArr, yArr)` | `ClassZedGraph.PlotXY(zg, xArr, yArr)` |
   110→| `ClearData()` | `ClassZedGraph.ClearGraph(zg)` |
   111→| 초기화 (없음 - 디자이너) | `ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(zg, title, yTitle, yMin, yMax)` |
   112→
   113→---
   114→
   115→## 5. FrmMain.vb 수정
   116→
   117→### InitGraphs 서브루틴 추가
   118→
   119→```vb
   120→''' ZedGraph 그래프 초기화
   121→Sub InitGraphs()
   122→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphAmp,    "흡기 전류",   "A",  0, 0.6, 25)
   123→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphDiff,   "흡기 변위량", "mm", 0, 50,  25)
   124→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphNoise,  "흡기 노이즈", "dB", 0, 100, 25)
   125→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphAmp1,   "배기 전류",   "A",  0, 0.6, 25)
   126→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphDiff1,  "배기 변위량", "mm", 0, 50,  25)
   127→    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphNoise1, "배기 노이즈", "dB", 0, 100, 25)
   128→End Sub
   129→```
   130→
   131→Form_Load에서 호출:
   132→
   133→```vb
   134→Private Sub FrmMain_Load(...) Handles MyBase.Load
   135→    InitGraphs()
   136→    ' ... 기타 초기화
   137→End Sub
   138→```
   139→
   140→### 실시간 데이터 플롯 (스레드에서 호출)
   141→
   142→```vb
   143→' 기존 NI 방식
   144→gLGraphAmp.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(xVal, gCurrentValue)
   145→
   146→' ZedGraph 방식
   147→ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(gLGraphAmp, 0, gCurrentValue, xVal)
   148→```
   149→
   150→### 그래프 클리어
   151→
   152→```vb
   153→' 기존 NI 방식
   154→gLGraphAmp.ClearData()
   155→
   156→' ZedGraph 방식
   157→ClassZedGraph.ClearGraph(gLGraphAmp)
   158→```
   159→
   160→### Cursors 관련 코드 삭제
   161→
   162→```vb
   163→' 아래 NI Cursor 관련 코드 모두 삭제
   164→gLGraphAmp.Cursors(0).XPosition = ...
   165→gLGraphAmp.Cursors(0).YPosition = ...
   166→' ZedGraph에서는 불필요
   167→```
   168→
   169→---
   170→
   171→## 6. InitGraph 파라미터 정리
   172→
   173→```vb
   174→ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(
   175→    zg             As ZedGraphControl,   ' 대상 컨트롤
   176→    title          As String,            ' 그래프 제목
   177→    yTitle         As String,            ' Y축 단위 레이블
   178→    yMin           As Double,            ' Y축 최소값 (고정)
   179→    yMax           As Double,            ' Y축 최대값 (고정)
   180→    Optional xMax  As Double = 25,       ' X축 초기 최대값 (자동 스케일로 무시됨)
   181→    Optional pointsCapacity As Integer = 10000000,  ' 버퍼 크기
   182→    Optional clearAll As Boolean = True,
   183→    Optional curveColor As Nullable(Of Color) = Nothing,  ' Nothing = Lime 형광 녹색
   184→    Optional lineWidth As Single = 1.7F
   185→)
   186→```
   187→
   188→---
   189→
   190→## 7. 스타일 스펙 (NI ScatterGraph 동일 재현)
   191→
   192→| 항목 | 값 |
   193→|------|----|
   194→| 배경색 | `Color.FromArgb(0, 0, 54)` (진한 남색) |
   195→| 그리드 | 없음 (IsVisible = False) |
   196→| 선 색상 | `Color.Lime` (형광 녹색) |
   197→| 선 두께 | 1.7F |
   198→| X축 | 자동 스케일 (MinAuto/MaxAuto = True) |
   199→| Y축 | 고정 범위 (MinAuto/MaxAuto = False) |
   200→| 텍스트 색상 | White |
   201→| 폰트 | 굴림 |
   202→| 범례 | 숨김 (IsVisible = False) |
   203→| AntiAlias | True |
   204→
   205→---
   206→
   207→## 8. 주의사항
   208→
   209→- **스레드 안전**: `DrawGraph` 내부에서 `zg.Invalidate()` 호출 — UI 스레드가 아닌 경우 `InvokeRequired` 체크 필요할 수 있음 (대부분 타이머/스레드에서 직접 호출해도 동작하나, 엄밀히는 Invoke 필요)
   210→- **RollingPointPairList**: 고정 크기 원형 버퍼. `pointsCapacity` 기본값 10,000,000 — 메모리 주의. 실사용 기준 1,000~10,000 정도로 조정 권장
   211→- **ZedGraphControl 크기**: 너무 작으면 텍스트 잘림. FontSize 36~48 기준으로 최소 200x150 이상 권장
   212→- **Designer 호환**: ZedGraphControl은 WinForms 도구상자에 추가해서 사용 가능 (ZedGraph.dll 참조 추가 후 도구상자에 자동 등록)
   213→

file.content:
# NI ScatterGraph → ZedGraph 변환 가이드

## 개요

NI (National Instruments) ScatterGraph 컨트롤을 오픈소스 ZedGraph 라이브러리로 교체하는 방법.

- **목적**: NI 라이센스 비용 제거, 외부 의존성 없이 배포 가능
- **참조 프로젝트**: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5
- **검증 환경**: VB.NET, .NET Framework 4.0, Windows Forms

---

## 1. ZedGraph NuGet 설치

### packages.config 방식 (.NET Framework 구형 프로젝트)

`packages.config` 파일 생성 또는 추가:

```xml
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<packages>
  <package id="ZedGraph" version="5.2.0" targetFramework="net40" />
</packages>
```

### .vbproj 참조 추가

```xml
<Reference Include="ZedGraph, Version=5.2.0.439, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=02a83cbd123fcd60, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
  <HintPath>..\packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll</HintPath>
</Reference>
```

> NuGet 패키지 복원 후 `packages\ZedGraph.5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll` 생성됨

### NuGet 글로벌 캐시 위치 (이미 설치된 경우 복사 가능)

```
C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net35-Client\ZedGraph.dll  ← .NET 4.0 프로젝트 사용
C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net481\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 4.8.1 이상
C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net6.0\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 6
C:\Users\{사용자}\.nuget\packages\zedgraph\5.2.0\lib\net8.0\ZedGraph.dll        ← .NET 8
```

---

## 2. 프로젝트에서 NI 참조 제거

.vbproj에서 아래 참조 항목 삭제:

```xml
<!-- 삭제 대상 -->
<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms" ... />
<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.UI" ... />
<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.Common" ... />
<Reference Include="NationalInstruments.DAQmx" ... />
```

---

## 3. Designer.vb 수정

### 기존 NI ScatterGraph 선언 (삭제)

```vb
Friend WithEvents gLGraphAmp As NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms.ScatterGraph
```

### ZedGraph 컨트롤로 교체

```vb
Friend WithEvents gLGraphAmp As ZedGraph.ZedGraphControl
```

### InitializeComponent 내 변경

```vb
' 기존 NI 방식 (삭제)
Me.gLGraphAmp = New NationalInstruments.UI.WindowsForms.ScatterGraph()
Me.gLGraphAmp.Cursors.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.ScatterGraphCursor())
Me.gLGraphAmp.Plots.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.ScatterPlot())
Me.gLGraphAmp.XAxes.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.XAxis())
Me.gLGraphAmp.YAxes.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.YAxis())
Me.gLGraphAmp.Annotations.Add(New NationalInstruments.UI.XyPointAnnotation())

' 새 ZedGraph 방식
Me.gLGraphAmp = New ZedGraph.ZedGraphControl()
Me.gLGraphAmp.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(x, y)
Me.gLGraphAmp.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(w, h)
Me.gLGraphAmp.TabIndex = 0
Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollGrace = 0
Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMaxX = 0
Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMaxY = 0
Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMinX = 0
Me.gLGraphAmp.ScrollMinY = 0
```

---

## 4. ClassZedGraph.vb 추가 (헬퍼 클래스)

`ClassZedGraph.vb` 파일을 프로젝트에 추가한다. (이 폴더의 `ClassZedGraph.vb` 참조)

이 클래스는 NI ScatterGraph의 API 패턴을 그대로 유지하면서 ZedGraph로 구현:

| NI ScatterGraph 메서드 | ClassZedGraph 대체 메서드 |
|------------------------|--------------------------|
| `PlotXYAppend(series, x, y)` | `ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(zg, series, y, x)` |
| `PlotXY(xArr, yArr)` | `ClassZedGraph.PlotXY(zg, xArr, yArr)` |
| `ClearData()` | `ClassZedGraph.ClearGraph(zg)` |
| 초기화 (없음 - 디자이너) | `ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(zg, title, yTitle, yMin, yMax)` |

---

## 5. FrmMain.vb 수정

### InitGraphs 서브루틴 추가

```vb
''' ZedGraph 그래프 초기화
Sub InitGraphs()
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphAmp,    "흡기 전류",   "A",  0, 0.6, 25)
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphDiff,   "흡기 변위량", "mm", 0, 50,  25)
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphNoise,  "흡기 노이즈", "dB", 0, 100, 25)
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphAmp1,   "배기 전류",   "A",  0, 0.6, 25)
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphDiff1,  "배기 변위량", "mm", 0, 50,  25)
    ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(gLGraphNoise1, "배기 노이즈", "dB", 0, 100, 25)
End Sub
```

Form_Load에서 호출:

```vb
Private Sub FrmMain_Load(...) Handles MyBase.Load
    InitGraphs()
    ' ... 기타 초기화
End Sub
```

### 실시간 데이터 플롯 (스레드에서 호출)

```vb
' 기존 NI 방식
gLGraphAmp.Plots(0).PlotXYAppend(xVal, gCurrentValue)

' ZedGraph 방식
ClassZedGraph.DrawGraph(gLGraphAmp, 0, gCurrentValue, xVal)
```

### 그래프 클리어

```vb
' 기존 NI 방식
gLGraphAmp.ClearData()

' ZedGraph 방식
ClassZedGraph.ClearGraph(gLGraphAmp)
```

### Cursors 관련 코드 삭제

```vb
' 아래 NI Cursor 관련 코드 모두 삭제
gLGraphAmp.Cursors(0).XPosition = ...
gLGraphAmp.Cursors(0).YPosition = ...
' ZedGraph에서는 불필요
```

---

## 6. InitGraph 파라미터 정리

```vb
ClassZedGraph.InitGraph(
    zg             As ZedGraphControl,   ' 대상 컨트롤
    title          As String,            ' 그래프 제목
    yTitle         As String,            ' Y축 단위 레이블
    yMin           As Double,            ' Y축 최소값 (고정)
    yMax           As Double,            ' Y축 최대값 (고정)
    Optional xMax  As Double = 25,       ' X축 초기 최대값 (자동 스케일로 무시됨)
    Optional pointsCapacity As Integer = 10000000,  ' 버퍼 크기
    Optional clearAll As Boolean = True,
    Optional curveColor As Nullable(Of Color) = Nothing,  ' Nothing = Lime 형광 녹색
    Optional lineWidth As Single = 1.7F
)
```

---

## 7. 스타일 스펙 (NI ScatterGraph 동일 재현)

| 항목 | 값 |
|------|----|
| 배경색 | `Color.FromArgb(0, 0, 54)` (진한 남색) |
| 그리드 | 없음 (IsVisible = False) |
| 선 색상 | `Color.Lime` (형광 녹색) |
| 선 두께 | 1.7F |
| X축 | 자동 스케일 (MinAuto/MaxAuto = True) |
| Y축 | 고정 범위 (MinAuto/MaxAuto = False) |
| 텍스트 색상 | White |
| 폰트 | 굴림 |
| 범례 | 숨김 (IsVisible = False) |
| AntiAlias | True |

---

## 8. 주의사항

- **스레드 안전**: `DrawGraph` 내부에서 `zg.Invalidate()` 호출 — UI 스레드가 아닌 경우 `InvokeRequired` 체크 필요할 수 있음 (대부분 타이머/스레드에서 직접 호출해도 동작하나, 엄밀히는 Invoke 필요)
- **RollingPointPairList**: 고정 크기 원형 버퍼. `pointsCapacity` 기본값 10,000,000 — 메모리 주의. 실사용 기준 1,000~10,000 정도로 조정 권장
- **ZedGraphControl 크기**: 너무 작으면 텍스트 잘림. FontSize 36~48 기준으로 최소 200x150 이상 권장
- **Designer 호환**: ZedGraphControl은 WinForms 도구상자에 추가해서 사용 가능 (ZedGraph.dll 참조 추가 후 도구상자에 자동 등록)

content.content:
1→# FlexCell Grid → DataGridView 변환 가이드
     2→
     3→## 개요
     4→
     5→FlexCell Grid 컨트롤을 .NET 표준 DataGridView로 교체하는 방법.
     6→
     7→- **목적**: FlexCell 라이센스 비용 제거, 설치 없이 배포 가능
     8→- **참조 프로젝트**: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5
     9→- **적용 폼**: FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmBasic
    10→
    11→---
    12→
    13→## 1. 프로젝트에서 FlexCell 참조 제거
    14→
    15→.vbproj에서 삭제:
    16→
    17→```xml
    18→<!-- 삭제 대상 -->
    19→<Reference Include="FlexCell, Version=4.3.7.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=6f86587eb70ee309, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
    20→  <HintPath>..\..\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
    21→  <Private>True</Private>
    22→</Reference>
    23→```
    24→
    25→---
    26→
    27→## 2. Designer.vb 수정
    28→
    29→### 기존 FlexCell 선언 (삭제)
    30→
    31→```vb
    32→Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.FlexGrid
    33→```
    34→
    35→### DataGridView로 교체
    36→
    37→```vb
    38→Friend WithEvents dgv As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView
    39→```
    40→
    41→### InitializeComponent 내 변경
    42→
    43→```vb
    44→' 기존 FlexCell 방식 (삭제)
    45→Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.FlexGrid()
    46→Me.Grid1.AllowBigSelection = False
    47→Me.Grid1.ColCount = 10
    48→Me.Grid1.RowCount = 100
    49→' ... 기타 FlexCell 전용 속성
    50→
    51→' 새 DataGridView 방식
    52→Me.dgv = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()
    53→Me.dgv.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(x, y)
    54→Me.dgv.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(w, h)
    55→Me.dgv.AllowUserToAddRows = False
    56→Me.dgv.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
    57→Me.dgv.ReadOnly = True
    58→Me.dgv.AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.None
    59→Me.dgv.SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
    60→Me.dgv.MultiSelect = False
    61→Me.dgv.RowHeadersVisible = False
    62→Me.dgv.BackgroundColor = SystemColors.Window
    63→```
    64→
    65→---
    66→
    67→## 3. 컬럼 구성 방식
    68→
    69→### FlexCell 방식 (코드로 직접 셀 접근)
    70→
    71→```vb
    72→Grid1.ColCount = 5
    73→Grid1.RowCount = 100
    74→Grid1.SetData(row, col, value)
    75→Dim val = Grid1.GetData(row, col)
    76→```
    77→
    78→### DataGridView 방식 (컬럼 정의 후 Row 추가)
    79→

   116→
   117→```vb
   118→Sub LoadGrid()

   130→                dgv.Rows.Add(row("PartNO"), row("PartName"), ...)

   144→    Dim sql As String = "SELECT PartNO, PartName, Separator FROM Table_Part ORDER BY PartNO"

   182→    Dim connStr As String = "..."
   183→    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
   184→        conn.Open()
   185→        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In dgv.Rows
   186→            Dim partNO = row.Cells("PartNO").Value?.ToString()
   187→            Dim separator = row.Cells("Separator").Value?.ToString()
   188→
   189→            Dim sql As String = "UPDATE Table_Part SET Separator=? WHERE PartNO=?"
   190→            Using cmd As New OleDb.OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
   191→                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@sep", separator)
   192→                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@pno", partNO)

   210→

   212→        ' 헤더

   215→            headers.Add(col.HeaderText)

   224→            Next

   234→## 7. FlexCell vs DataGridView API 대응표
   235→
   236→| FlexCell | DataGridView |
   237→|----------|-------------|
   238→| `Grid1.ColCount = N` | 컬럼 `Add()` N번 |
   239→| `Grid1.RowCount = N` | `Rows.Add()` N번 |
   240→| `Grid1.SetData(r, c, v)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value = v` |
   241→| `Grid1.GetData(r, c)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value` |

   245→| `Grid1.Redraw()` | `dgv.Refresh()` |
   246→| `Grid1.Clear()` | `dgv.Rows.Clear()` |

   251→
   252→- **컬럼 자동생성 vs 수동**: `DataSource` 바인딩 시 컬럼 자동 생성. 컬럼 순서/폭 제어가 필요하면 `AutoGenerateColumns = False` 후 수동 정의

file.content:
# FlexCell Grid → DataGridView 변환 가이드

## 개요

FlexCell Grid 컨트롤을 .NET 표준 DataGridView로 교체하는 방법.

- **목적**: FlexCell 라이센스 비용 제거, 설치 없이 배포 가능
- **참조 프로젝트**: MYUNG_BO_NOISETEST / LsuptNoiseTestmx5
- **적용 폼**: FrmPart, FrmSearch, FrmBasic

---

## 1. 프로젝트에서 FlexCell 참조 제거

.vbproj에서 삭제:

```xml
<!-- 삭제 대상 -->
<Reference Include="FlexCell, Version=4.3.7.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=6f86587eb70ee309, processorArchitecture=MSIL">
  <HintPath>..\..\Program Files (x86)\FlexCell Technologies\FlexCell.NET4\bin\FlexCell.dll</HintPath>
  <Private>True</Private>
</Reference>
```

---

## 2. Designer.vb 수정

### 기존 FlexCell 선언 (삭제)

```vb
Friend WithEvents Grid1 As FlexCell.FlexGrid
```

### DataGridView로 교체

```vb
Friend WithEvents dgv As System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView
```

### InitializeComponent 내 변경

```vb
' 기존 FlexCell 방식 (삭제)
Me.Grid1 = New FlexCell.FlexGrid()
Me.Grid1.AllowBigSelection = False
Me.Grid1.ColCount = 10
Me.Grid1.RowCount = 100
' ... 기타 FlexCell 전용 속성

' 새 DataGridView 방식
Me.dgv = New System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView()
Me.dgv.Location = New System.Drawing.Point(x, y)
Me.dgv.Size = New System.Drawing.Size(w, h)
Me.dgv.AllowUserToAddRows = False
Me.dgv.AllowUserToDeleteRows = False
Me.dgv.ReadOnly = True
Me.dgv.AutoSizeColumnsMode = DataGridViewAutoSizeColumnsMode.None
Me.dgv.SelectionMode = DataGridViewSelectionMode.FullRowSelect
Me.dgv.MultiSelect = False
Me.dgv.RowHeadersVisible = False
Me.dgv.BackgroundColor = SystemColors.Window
```

---

## 3. 컬럼 구성 방식

### FlexCell 방식 (코드로 직접 셀 접근)

```vb
Grid1.ColCount = 5
Grid1.RowCount = 100
Grid1.SetData(row, col, value)
Dim val = Grid1.GetData(row, col)
```

### DataGridView 방식 (컬럼 정의 후 Row 추가)

#### 컬럼 정의 (InitGrid 서브루틴)

```vb
Sub InitGrid()
    dgv.Columns.Clear()

    ' 일반 텍스트 컬럼
    Dim col1 As New DataGridViewTextBoxColumn()
    col1.Name = "PartNO"
    col1.HeaderText = "파트번호"
    col1.Width = 120
    col1.ReadOnly = True
    dgv.Columns.Add(col1)

    ' 콤보박스 컬럼
    Dim colCombo As New DataGridViewComboBoxColumn()
    colCombo.Name = "Separator"
    colCombo.HeaderText = "구분자"
    colCombo.Width = 70
    colCombo.Items.AddRange(New String() {"A", "@"})
    dgv.Columns.Add(colCombo)

    ' 체크박스 컬럼
    Dim colChk As New DataGridViewCheckBoxColumn()
    colChk.Name = "CheckA_L"
    colChk.HeaderText = "A_L"
    colChk.Width = 45
    dgv.Columns.Add(colChk)
End Sub
```

---

## 4. 데이터 로드

### OleDb (Access MDB) 연동

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    dgv.Rows.Clear()

    Dim connStr As String = "Provider=Microsoft.Jet.OLEDB.4.0;Data Source=" & mdbPath
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Basic ORDER BY ID"

    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using da As New OleDb.OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
            Dim dt As New DataTable()
            da.Fill(dt)
            For Each row As DataRow In dt.Rows
                dgv.Rows.Add(row("PartNO"), row("PartName"), ...)
            Next
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

### SQL Server 연동

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    dgv.Rows.Clear()

    Dim connStr As String = "Data Source=서버;Initial Catalog=DB명;Integrated Security=True"
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT PartNO, PartName, Separator FROM Table_Part ORDER BY PartNO"

    Using conn As New SqlClient.SqlConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using cmd As New SqlClient.SqlCommand(sql, conn)
            Using reader = cmd.ExecuteReader()
                While reader.Read()
                    dgv.Rows.Add(reader("PartNO").ToString(), reader("PartName").ToString(), reader("Separator").ToString())
                End While
            End Using
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

### DataAdapter 자동 바인딩 (FrmSearch 스타일)

```vb
Sub LoadGrid()
    Dim connStr As String = "..."
    Dim sql As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Result"
    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        Using da As New OleDb.OleDbDataAdapter(sql, conn)
            Dim dt As New DataTable()
            da.Fill(dt)
            dgv.DataSource = dt   ' 자동 컬럼 생성 + 바인딩
        End Using
    End Using
End Sub
```

---

## 5. 데이터 저장

```vb
Sub SaveGrid()
    Dim connStr As String = "..."
    Using conn As New OleDb.OleDbConnection(connStr)
        conn.Open()
        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In dgv.Rows
            Dim partNO = row.Cells("PartNO").Value?.ToString()
            Dim separator = row.Cells("Separator").Value?.ToString()

            Dim sql As String = "UPDATE Table_Part SET Separator=? WHERE PartNO=?"
            Using cmd As New OleDb.OleDbCommand(sql, conn)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@sep", separator)
                cmd.Parameters.AddWithValue("@pno", partNO)
                cmd.ExecuteNonQuery()
            End Using
        Next
    End Using
End Sub
```

---

## 6. CSV 내보내기 (FrmSearch 스타일)

```vb
Sub ExportCsv()
    Dim sfd As New SaveFileDialog()
    sfd.Filter = "CSV 파일|*.csv"
    sfd.FileName = "export_" & Format(Now, "yyyyMMdd_HHmmss") & ".csv"
    If sfd.ShowDialog() <> DialogResult.OK Then Return

    Using sw As New IO.StreamWriter(sfd.FileName, False, System.Text.Encoding.UTF8)
        ' 헤더
        Dim headers As New List(Of String)
        For Each col As DataGridViewColumn In dgv.Columns
            headers.Add(col.HeaderText)
        Next
        sw.WriteLine(String.Join(",", headers))

        ' 데이터
        For Each row As DataGridViewRow In dgv.Rows
            Dim vals As New List(Of String)
            For Each cell As DataGridViewCell In row.Cells
                vals.Add(If(cell.Value IsNot Nothing, cell.Value.ToString(), ""))
            Next
            sw.WriteLine(String.Join(",", vals))
        Next
    End Using
    MsgBox("내보내기 완료: " & sfd.FileName)
End Sub
```

---

## 7. FlexCell vs DataGridView API 대응표

| FlexCell | DataGridView |
|----------|-------------|
| `Grid1.ColCount = N` | 컬럼 `Add()` N번 |
| `Grid1.RowCount = N` | `Rows.Add()` N번 |
| `Grid1.SetData(r, c, v)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value = v` |
| `Grid1.GetData(r, c)` | `dgv.Rows(r).Cells(c).Value` |
| `Grid1.Cols(c).Caption = s` | `dgv.Columns(c).HeaderText = s` |
| `Grid1.Cols(c).Width = n` | `dgv.Columns(c).Width = n` |
| `Grid1.Row` (선택 행) | `dgv.CurrentRow.Index` |
| `Grid1.Redraw()` | `dgv.Refresh()` |
| `Grid1.Clear()` | `dgv.Rows.Clear()` |

---

## 8. 주의사항

- **컬럼 자동생성 vs 수동**: `DataSource` 바인딩 시 컬럼 자동 생성. 컬럼 순서/폭 제어가 필요하면 `AutoGenerateColumns = False` 후 수동 정의
- **콤보박스 컬럼 편집**: `DataGridViewComboBoxColumn`은 편집 시 드롭다운 자동 표시됨. `EditingControlShowing` 이벤트 불필요
- **체크박스 컬럼**: `Value` 타입이 `Boolean`이므로 `CBool(cell.Value)` 로 읽기
- **DataGridView ReadOnly**: 전체 ReadOnly면 콤보/체크박스도 편집 불가. 편집 가능 컬럼은 컬럼별 `ReadOnly = False` 설정
- **FlexCell 라이센스 파일**: `FlexCell.lic` 파일이 프로젝트에 있으면 삭제

Imports System.Net.Sockets
Imports System.Runtime.InteropServices
Imports System.Text
Imports System.Net
Imports System.IO
Imports System.Threading
Imports System.Media
Imports System
Imports System.Collections.Generic
Imports System.ComponentModel
Imports System.Data
Imports System.Drawing
Imports System.Windows.Forms
Imports System.Drawing.Drawing2D
Imports System.Globalization
Imports System.IO.Ports
Imports System.Reflection
Imports System.Management
Imports System.Security.Cryptography
Imports NationalInstruments.DAQmx
Public Class FrmMain

    Private Player As New SoundPlayer
    Private Trd1 As Thread
    Private Trd2 As Thread
    Private Timer As New HiResTimer()

    Private Sub WriteText(ByVal TargetTextbox As TextBox, ByVal strMsg As String)

        If TargetTextbox.Lines.Length > 12 Then
            TargetTextbox.Text.Remove(0)
        End If
        TargetTextbox.AppendText(Format(Now, "yy-MM-dd") & " " & Format(Now, "HH:mm:ss") & "-" & strMsg & vbCrLf)

    End Sub

    Private Sub FrmMain_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        Control.CheckForIllegalCrossThreadCalls = False

        FlagTest = False

        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Program Start")
        LoadSetData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Set Data OK")
        LoadBarcodeData()
        WriteText(TextboxSystem, "Load Barcode Data OK")
        SerialOpen()

        If CheckFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log") = False Then MakeFolder(System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log")
        WriteLog("Program Start", "LOG")

        LoadSetData()

        InitControl()
        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()


        'S 00101 01010 11000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 00000 01000 10001 0001 E

        DoutString = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        DoutString2 = "S" & "00000000" & "00000000" & "E"
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio)
            Trd1.IsBackground = True
            Trd1.Start()
            Call SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then
            Trd2 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTaskDio2)
            Trd2.IsBackground = True
            Trd2.Start()
            Call SerialIO2.Write(DoutString)
        End If

        Timer1.Interval = 100
        Timer1.Start()

        Trd1 = New Thread(AddressOf ThreadTask)
        Trd1.IsBackground = True
        Trd1.Start()

        DaqStart()

        SetVoltage(0, 0)
        SetVoltage(1, 0)

    End Sub

    Private RecvString As New System.Text.StringBuilder()
    Private RecvString2 As New System.Text.StringBuilder()


    Public Sub DOON(ByVal num1 As Integer)

        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "1"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If

    End Sub

    Public Sub DOOFF(ByVal num1 As Integer)
        If num1 < 16 Then
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString, CInt(num1 + 2), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        Else
            Try
                Mid$(DoutString2, CInt(num1 - 14), 1) = "0"
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
        End If
    End Sub


    Public Sub DOWRITE()
        If SerialIO.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO.Write(DoutString)
        If SerialIO2.IsOpen = True Then SerialIO2.Write(DoutString2)
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString.Clear()
                    SerialIO.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop
    End Sub

    Private Sub ThreadTaskDio2()

        Dim i As Integer
        Do While SerialIO2.IsOpen = True
            Try
                Dim Incoming As String = SerialIO2.ReadLine()
                If Incoming Is Nothing Then
                    'Exit Do
                Else
                    RecvString2.Append(Incoming)
                    If RecvString2.Length = 66 Then
                        If Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 1, 1) = "S" And Mid(RecvString2.ToString, 66, 1) = "E" Then
                            For i = 0 To 31
                                IoInput(i + 32) = CInt(Mid$(RecvString2.ToString, i + 2, 1))
                            Next
                        End If
                    End If
                    RecvString2.Clear()
                    SerialIO2.DiscardInBuffer()
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

#Region "Function"

    Private Function CheckDuplicate(ByVal strData As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Dim i As Integer
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Dim tmpQurry As String = "SELECT * FROM Table_Main Where "
        'For i = 1 To SeqTotal
        '    If i = SeqTotal Then
        '        tmpQurry = tmpQurry & "Job" & CStr(i) & "Value = '" & strData & "'"
        '    Else

Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Private reqcount As Double

    Private Sub Timer1_Tick(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Timer1.Tick

        DOWRITE()
        If RequestSTep = 0 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:VOLT?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 1 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 2 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "MEAS:CURR?")
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 3
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 3 Then
            reqcount = reqcount + 0.1
        ElseIf RequestSTep = 4 Then
            RequestSupply(SerialPowerSupply, "SOURS:VOLT " & CStr(TargetVolt))
            reqcount = 0
            RequestSTep = 0
        End If

        If reqcount > 1 Then RequestSTep = 0

        lbVOlt.Text = ValueVolt & " " & "V"
        lbAMP.Text = ValueAmp & " " & "A"

    End Sub

    Private Buffer As String
    Public ValueVolt As Double
    Public ValueAmp As Double
    Private Sub SerialPowerSupply_DataReceived(sender As Object, e As SerialDataReceivedEventArgs) Handles SerialPowerSupply.DataReceived
        Try
            Dim RecvData As String = SerialPowerSupply.ReadExisting()
            Buffer = Buffer & RecvData
            If Buffer.Contains(Chr(13)) = True Then 'ETX
                If RequestSTep = 1 Then
                    ValueVolt = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 2
                ElseIf RequestStep = 3 Then
                    ValueAmp = CDbl(Format(CDbl(Mid(Buffer, 1, Len(Buffer) - 1)), "#0.0#"))
                    RequestSTep = 4
                End If
                Buffer = ""
                SerialPowerSupply.DiscardInBuffer()
            End If
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

#Region "NI DAQMX"

    Private myTask As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private myTask2 As Task  'Main Task which is Assigned when the Start Button is Clicked
    Private runningTask As Task
    Private data As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)()
    Private analogInReader As AnalogMultiChannelReader
    Private analogCallback As AsyncCallback
    Private dataColumn As DataColumn()
    Private dataTable As DataTable = New DataTable

    Public Sub SetVoltage(Channel As Integer, Val As Double)

        Try
            myTask2 = New Task()
            If Channel = 0 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao0", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo1.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            ElseIf Channel = 1 Then
                myTask2.AOChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ao1", "aoChannel", Convert.ToDouble("-10"), Convert.ToDouble("10"), AOVoltageUnits.Volts)
                lbDo2.Text = CStr(Val) & " Bar"
            End If
            Dim writer As AnalogSingleChannelWriter = New AnalogSingleChannelWriter(myTask2.Stream)
            writer.WriteSingleSample(True, Convert.ToDouble(CStr(Val) * 10))
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
        Finally
            myTask2.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private Sub AnalogInCallback(ByVal ar As IAsyncResult)
        Try
            If (Not (runningTask Is Nothing)) AndAlso runningTask Is ar.AsyncState Then
                data = analogInReader.EndReadWaveform(ar)
                dataToDataTable(data, dataTable)
                analogInReader.BeginMemoryOptimizedReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask, data)
            End If
        Catch ex As DaqException
            MessageBox.Show(ex.Message)
            runningTask = Nothing
            myTask.Dispose()
        End Try

    End Sub

    Private ValueNoise As Double
    Private ValueFlow As Double
    Private ValuePressure As Double
    Private Sub dataToDataTable(ByVal sourceArray As AnalogWaveform(Of Double)(), ByRef dataTable As DataTable)

        Dim currentLineIndex As Integer = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch1AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch2AvrSUm As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrCOunt As Double = 0
        Dim Ch3AvrSUm As Double = 0

        For Each waveform As AnalogWaveform(Of Double) In sourceArray
            Dim dataCount As Integer = 0
            If waveform.Samples.Count < 10 Then
                dataCount = waveform.Samples.Count
            Else
                dataCount = 10
            End If

            For sample As Integer = 0 To (dataCount - 1)
                dataTable.Rows(sample)(currentLineIndex) = waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                If currentLineIndex = 0 Then
                    Ch1AvrSUm = Ch1AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch1AvrCOunt = Ch1AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 1 Then
                    Ch2AvrSUm = Ch2AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch2AvrCOunt = Ch2AvrCOunt + 1
                ElseIf currentLineIndex = 2 Then
                    Ch3AvrSUm = Ch3AvrSUm + waveform.Samples(sample).Value
                    Ch3AvrCOunt = Ch3AvrCOunt + 1
                End If
            Next
            currentLineIndex += 1
        Next

        '1 bar <-> 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 kf.cm^2 <-> 1/ 1.02 kgf.cm^2
        '1 bar <-> 100 Kpa

        ValueNoise = CDbl(Format((Ch1AvrSUm / Ch1AvrCOunt * 100), "#0.0#"))
        If CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#")) > 1 Then
            ValuePressure = CDbl(Format(((Ch3AvrSUm / Ch3AvrCOunt) + 0.61) * 100, "#0.0#"))
        Else
            ValuePressure = 0
        End If

        ValueFlow = (CDbl(Format((Ch2AvrSUm / Ch2AvrCOunt), "#0.0#")) * 20)

        'flow
        '0V 
        '5V - 100 L/min
        'y = 20x
        'Pressure
        '0V
        '5V - 200 Kpa
        'y = 0.04x
        lbNoise.text = CStr(ValueNoise) & " " & "dB"
        lbPressure.Text = CStr(ValuePressure) & " " & "KPa"
        lbFlow.Text = CStr(ValueFlow) & " " & "l/min"

    End Sub

    Public Sub InitializeDataTable(ByVal channelCollection As AIChannelCollection, ByRef data As DataTable)
        Dim numOfChannels As Int16 = channelCollection.Count
        data.Rows.Clear()
        data.Columns.Clear()
        dataColumn = New DataColumn(numOfChannels) {}
        Dim numOfRows As Int16 = 10
        Dim currentChannelIndex As Int16 = 0
        Dim currentDataIndex As Int16 = 0
        For currentChannelIndex = 0 To (numOfChannels - 1)
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex) = New DataColumn
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).DataType = System.Type.GetType("System.Double")
            dataColumn(currentChannelIndex).ColumnName = channelCollection(currentChannelIndex).PhysicalName
        Next
        data.Columns.AddRange(dataColumn)
        For currentDataIndex = 0 To (numOfRows - 1)
            Dim rowArr As Object() = New Object(numOfChannels - 1) {}
            data.Rows.Add(rowArr)
        Next
    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqStart()

        If runningTask Is Nothing Then
            Try
                myTask = New Task()
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai0", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai1", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.AIChannels.CreateVoltageChannel("Dev1/ai2", "", CType(-1, AITerminalConfiguration), 0, 10, AIVoltageUnits.Volts)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Timing.ConfigureSampleClock("", 1000, SampleClockActiveEdge.Rising, SampleQuantityMode.ContinuousSamples, 100)
                myTask.Control(TaskAction.Verify)
                runningTask = myTask
                analogInReader = New AnalogMultiChannelReader(myTask.Stream)
                analogCallback = New AsyncCallback(AddressOf AnalogInCallback)
                InitializeDataTable(myTask.AIChannels, dataTable)
                acquisitionDataGrid.DataSource = dataTable
                analogInReader.SynchronizeCallbacks = True
                analogInReader.BeginReadWaveform(100, analogCallback, myTask)
                LedDAQ.Value = True
            Catch exception As DaqException
                MessageBox.Show(exception.Message)
                runningTask = Nothing
                myTask.Dispose()
            End Try
        End If

        myTask2 = New Task()

    End Sub

    Private Sub DaqEnd()
        runningTask = Nothing
        myTask.Dispose()
    End Sub

    Private Sub ascButtonTest_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.ClickEvent
        FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub AxCWButton3_ClickEvent(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles ascButtonTest.ClickEvent
        'FrmTest.Show()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button1_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button1.Click
        wStep = 10000
    End Sub

    Private Sub Button2_Click(sender As Object, e As EventArgs) Handles Button2.Click
        Try
            wStep = CDbl(TextBox1.Text)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub


#End Region

End Class

    93→    Private Sub LoadGrid()
    94→
    95→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
    96→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
    97→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
    98→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
    99→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   100→        InitGrid()
   101→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PartNo),PartNo", MdbConnect)
   102→        With Grid1
   103→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
   104→                MsgBox("Empty Info.")
   105→            Else
   106→                Rs.MoveFirst()
   107→                Do Until Rs.EOF
   108→                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) &
   109→                             Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value & Chr(9) &
   110→                             Rs.Fields("PartName").Value & Chr(9) &
   111→                             Rs.Fields("Position").Value & Chr(9) &
   112→                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   113→                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   114→                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   115→                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   116→                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   117→                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   118→                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   119→                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   120→                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   121→                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   122→                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   123→                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   124→                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   125→                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   126→                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   127→                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   128→                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   129→                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   130→                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   131→                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   132→                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   133→                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
   134→                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
   135→                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMax").Value)
   136→
   137→                    Rs.MoveNext()
   138→                Loop
   139→            End If
   140→            ShapeIndex = Rs.RecordCount
   141→            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
   142→            Rs.Close()
   143→        End With
   144→        ConnectionCloseMDB()
   145→
   146→    End Sub
   147→
   148→    Private Sub SaveGrid()
   149→
   150→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   151→        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
   152→        Dim i As Integer
   153→        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
   154→        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
   155→        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
   156→        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PArtno),PArtno", MdbConnect)
   157→        With Grid1
   158→            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
   159→                MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")

Public Class FrmPart

    Private ShapeIndex As Integer
    Private ClickIndex As Integer

    Private Sub Frmpart_Load(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles Me.Load

        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub InitGrid()

        With Grid1
            .DisplayFocusRect = False
            .DrawMode = FlexCell.DrawModeEnum.OwnerDraw
            .AllowUserResizing = FlexCell.ResizeEnum.None
            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Cols = 29
            .Rows = 1
            .Column(1).Locked = False
            .Column(2).Locked = False
            For i As Integer = 0 To 28
                .Column(i).Alignment = FlexCell.AlignmentEnum.CenterCenter
            Next
            .Column(0).Width = 10
            .Column(1).Width = 0
            .Column(2).Width = 200
            .Column(3).Width = 200
            .Column(4).Width = 100
            .Column(5).Width = 160
            .Column(6).Width = 160
            .Column(7).Width = 160
            .Column(8).Width = 160
            .Column(9).Width = 160
            .Column(10).Width = 160
            .Column(11).Width = 160
            .Column(12).Width = 160
            .Column(13).Width = 160
            .Column(14).Width = 160
            .Column(15).Width = 160
            .Column(16).Width = 160
            .Column(17).Width = 160
            .Column(18).Width = 160
            .Column(19).Width = 160
            .Column(20).Width = 160
            .Column(21).Width = 160
            .Column(22).Width = 160
            .Column(23).Width = 160
            .Column(24).Width = 160
            .Column(25).Width = 160
            .Column(26).Width = 160
            .Column(27).Width = 160
            .Column(28).Width = 160

            .Cell(0, 1).Text = "ID"
            .Cell(0, 2).Text = "품번"
            .Cell(0, 3).Text = "품명"
            .Cell(0, 4).Text = "포지션"

            .Cell(0, 5).Text = "1차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 6).Text = "1차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 7).Text = "1차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 8).Text = "1차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 9).Text = "1차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 10).Text = "1차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 11).Text = "2차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 12).Text = "2차CloseTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 13).Text = "2차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 14).Text = "2차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 15).Text = "2차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 16).Text = "2차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 17).Text = "2차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 18).Text = "2차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 19).Text = "2차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 20).Text = "2차CloseTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 21).Text = "3차OpenAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 22).Text = "3차OpenAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 23).Text = "3차OpenTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 24).Text = "3차OpenTimeMax"
            .Cell(0, 25).Text = "3차CloseAngleMin"
            .Cell(0, 26).Text = "3차CloseAngleMax"
            .Cell(0, 27).Text = "3차CloseTimeMin"
            .Cell(0, 28).Text = "3차CloseTimeMax"

            .AutoRedraw = True
            .Refresh()
        End With

    End Sub

    Private Sub LoadGrid()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        InitGrid()
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PartNo),PartNo", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Info.")
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    .AddItem(Rs.Fields("ID").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("PartName").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Position").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Second_BwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_FwdTimeMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdAngleMax").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMin").Value & Chr(9) &
                             Rs.Fields("Third_BwdTimeMax").Value)

                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            ShapeIndex = Rs.RecordCount
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub SaveGrid()

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part ORDER BY LEN(PArtno),PArtno", MdbConnect)
        With Grid1
            If Rs.RecordCount <= 0 Then
                MsgBox("Empty Point Info.")
            ElseIf Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
                i = 1
                Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
                Rs.Fields("Position").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text

                Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 9).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 10).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 11).Text
                Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 12).Text

                Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text
                Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text

                Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 21).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 23).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 24).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 25).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 26).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 27).Text
                Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 28).Text

                Rs.Update()
            Else
                Rs.MoveFirst()
                i = 1
                Do Until Rs.EOF
                    Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 2).Text
                    Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 3).Text
                    Rs.Fields("Position").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 4).Text

                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 5).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 6).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 7).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 8).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 9).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 10).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 11).Text
                    Rs.Fields("First_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 12).Text

                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 13).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 14).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 15).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 16).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 17).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 18).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 19).Text
                    Rs.Fields("second_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 20).Text

                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 21).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 22).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 23).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_FwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 24).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 25).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdAngleMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 26).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMin").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 27).Text
                    Rs.Fields("third_BwdTimeMax").Value = Grid1.Cell(i, 28).Text
                    Rs.Update()
                    i = i + 1
                    Rs.MoveNext()
                Loop
            End If
            Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
            Rs.Close()
        End With
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Private Sub Delete(ByVal strID)
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part WHERE ID = " & strID, MdbConnect)
        If Rs.RecordCount = 1 Then
            Rs.Delete()
            Rs.Update()
            ClickIndex = 0
        End If
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
    End Sub

    Private Sub Grid1_MouseClick(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.Windows.Forms.MouseEventArgs) Handles Grid1.MouseClick

        If Grid1.Selection.FirstCol = 1 Then
            ClickIndex = Grid1.Selection.FirstRow
        End If

        If Grid1.Selection.FirstCol = 16 Then

            Dim Open As New OpenFileDialog()
            Open.ShowDialog()
            If Open.FileName = "" Then
                Grid1.Cell(Grid1.Selection.FirstRow, Grid1.Selection.FirstCol).Text = "0"
            Else
                Grid1.Cell(Grid1.Selection.FirstRow, Grid1.Selection.FirstCol).Text = Open.FileName
            End If

        End If

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonADd_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonADd.ClickEvent

        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Dim Rs As New ADODB.Recordset
        Dim i As Integer
        Rs.CursorLocation = ADODB.CursorLocationEnum.adUseClient
        Rs.CursorType = ADODB.CursorTypeEnum.adOpenStatic
        Rs.LockType = ADODB.LockTypeEnum.adLockOptimistic
        Rs.Open("SELECT * FROM Table_Part", MdbConnect)
        Rs.AddNew()
        Rs.Fields("PlcID").Value = CStr(Rs.RecordCount + 1)
        Rs.Fields("PartNo").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("PartName").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("TargetScan").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("TargetTool").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdSpecMin").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdSpecMax").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdTimeStart").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("FwdTimeEnd").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdSpecMin").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdSpecMax").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdTimeStart").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("BwdTimeEnd").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("4mCode").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("EoNumber").Value = "0"
        Rs.Fields("ImagePath").Value = "0"
        Rs.Update()
        Rs.ActiveConnection = Nothing
        Rs.Close()
        ConnectionCloseMDB()
        InitGrid()
        LoadGrid()

    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonDelete_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonDelete.ClickEvent
        If ClickIndex <> 0 Then
            Delete(Grid1.Cell(ClickIndex, 1).Text)
            InitGrid()
            LoadGrid()
        Else
            MsgBox("Selct Row")
        End If
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonSAve_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonSAve.ClickEvent
        SaveGrid()
    End Sub

    Private Sub axcButtonClose_ClickEvent(ByVal sender As Object, ByVal e As System.EventArgs) Handles axcButtonClose.ClickEvent
        Me.Close()
    End Sub

End Class

   161→    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
   162→        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
   163→        hexv = ""
   164→        Do While DecNum > 0
   165→            na = DecNum Mod 16
   166→            Select Case na
   167→                Case 10
   168→                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
   169→                Case 11
   170→                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
   171→                Case 12
   172→                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
   173→                Case 13
   174→                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
   175→                Case 14
   176→                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
   177→                Case 15
   178→                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
   179→                Case Else
   180→                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
   181→            End Select
   182→            If DecNum >= 16 Then
   183→                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
   184→            Else
   185→                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
   186→                Exit Do
   187→            End If
   188→        Loop
   189→        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
   190→            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
   191→        Else
   192→            Dec2Hex = hexv
   193→        End If
   194→        If DecNum = 0 Then
   195→            Dec2Hex = "00"
   196→        End If
   197→    End Function

   200→        Dim intNum As Integer

   205→        Hex2Asc = Chr(intNum)

   452→    Public Function Asc2PrinterStr(ByVal str As String) As String
   453→
   454→        Dim tmp As String = ""
   455→        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
   456→        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
   457→        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
   458→        If Len(str) > 2 Then
   459→            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(str)
   460→                If Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 4 Then 'EOT
   461→                    tmp = tmp & EOT
   462→                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 30 Then 'RS
   463→                    tmp = tmp & RS
   464→                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 29 Then 'GS
   465→                    tmp = tmp & GS
   466→                Else
   467→                    tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
   468→                End If
   469→            Next
   470→        Else
   471→        End If
   472→        If tmp = "" Then
   473→        Else
   474→            tmp = "#" & tmp
   475→        End If
   476→        Return tmp
   477→
   478→    End Function

   530→    Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal strMsg As String, ByVal strType As String)
   531→
   532→        Dim flagSave = True
   533→        Dim tmpLogFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
   534→        Dim Tmpdtp As String = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & vbTab
   535→        Dim SaveStep As Integer = 0
   536→
   537→        Do
   538→            Try
   539→                If SaveStep = 0 Then
   540→                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = False Then
   541→                        MakeFolder(tmpLogFolder)
   542→                        SaveStep = 1
   543→                    Else
   544→                        SaveStep = 1
   545→                    End If
   546→                ElseIf SaveStep = 1 Then
   547→                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True Then
   548→                        SaveStep = 2
   549→                    End If
   550→                ElseIf SaveStep = 2 Then
   551→                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = False Then
   552→                        MakeFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt")
   553→                        SaveStep = 3
   554→                    Else
   555→                        SaveStep = 3
   556→                    End If
   557→                ElseIf SaveStep = 3 Then
   558→                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
   559→                        SaveStep = 4
   560→                    End If
   561→                ElseIf SaveStep = 4 Then
   562→                    WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
   563→                    Exit Do
   564→                End If
   565→            Catch ex As Exception
   566→                Exit Do
   567→            End Try
   568→            Application.DoEvents()
   569→        Loop
   570→
   571→    End Sub

   575→        Dim strSQL As String = ""
   576→        ConnectionOpenMDB()
   577→        Try
   578→            MdbConnect.Execute(strQurry)
   579→        Catch ex As Exception
   580→            'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
   581→        End Try
   582→        ConnectionCloseMDB()
   583→

   588→        Dim strSQL As String = ""

   591→            SqlConnect.Execute(strQurry)

   599→    Public Function DeleteSpace(ByVal str As String) As String
   600→        Dim tmp As String = ""
   601→        Dim i As Integer
   602→        For i = 1 To Len(str)
   603→            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
   604→            Else
   605→                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
   606→            End If
   607→        Next
   608→        tmp = tmp
   609→        Return tmp
   610→    End Function
   611→
   612→    Public Class HiResTimer
   613→
   614→        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
   615→        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
   616→        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
   617→        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
   618→
   619→        Public Sub New()
   620→            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
   621→            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
   622→                isPerfCounterSupported = True
   623→            Else
   624→                timerFrequency = 1000
   625→            End If
   626→        End Sub
   627→
   628→        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
   629→            Get
   630→                Return timerFrequency
   631→            End Get
   632→        End Property
   633→
   634→        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
   635→            Get
   636→                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0
   637→
   638→                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
   639→                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
   640→                    Return tickCount
   641→                Else
   642→                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
   643→                End If
   644→            End Get
   645→        End Property
   646→
   647→    End Class
   648→
   649→    Public Function Hex2Bin(ByVal sHex As String) As String
   650→        Dim sBin As String
   651→        sBin = ""
   652→        If Len(sHex) > 2 Then
   653→            sHex = UCase(sHex)
   654→            If Left(sHex, 2) = "&H" Then
   655→                Dim iHex As Integer, jHex As Integer
   656→                Dim cHex As String
   657→                Dim HBi As Integer
   658→                Dim HBin As String
   659→                sHex = Mid(sHex, 3)
   660→                For HBi = 1 To Len(sHex)
   661→                    cHex = Mid(sHex, HBi, 1)
   662→                    Select Case cHex
   663→                        Case "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"
   664→                            iHex = Asc(cHex) - 55
   665→                        Case Else
   666→                            iHex = Val(cHex)
   667→                    End Select
   668→                    HBin = ""
   669→                    jHex = 8
   670→                    For HBj = 1 To 4
   671→                        If iHex >= jHex Then
   672→                            HBin = HBin & "1"
   673→                            iHex = iHex - jHex
   674→                        Else
   675→                            HBin = HBin & "0"
   676→                        End If
   677→                        jHex = jHex / 2
   678→                    Next
   679→                    sBin = sBin & HBin
   680→                Next
   681→            End If
   682→        End If
   683→        Return sBin
   684→    End Function
   685→
   686→    Public Function Bin2Hex(ByVal sBin As String)
   687→        Dim sHex As String
   688→        Dim lenBin As Integer
   689→        sHex = ""
   690→        lenBin = Len(sBin)
   691→        If lenBin > 0 Then
   692→            Dim splitLen As Integer
   693→            Dim splitBin As String
   694→            Dim iBin As Integer
   695→            Dim jBin As Integer
   696→            If lenBin Mod 4 <> 0 Then
   697→                For BHi = 1 To 4 - (lenBin Mod 4)
   698→                    sBin = "0" & sBin
   699→                Next
   700→            End If
   701→            lenBin = Len(sBin)
   702→            splitLen = lenBin / 4
   703→            For BHi = 1 To splitLen
   704→                splitBin = Mid(sBin, ((BHi - 1) * 4) + 1, 4)
   705→                jBin = 8
   706→                iBin = 0
   707→                For BHj = 1 To 4
   708→                    If Mid(splitBin, BHj, 1) = "1" Then
   709→                        iBin = iBin + jBin
   710→                    End If
   711→                    jBin = jBin / 2
   712→                Next
   713→                sHex = sHex & Hex(iBin)
   714→            Next
   715→        End If
   716→        Return sHex
   717→
   718→    End Function
   719→
   720→End Module

    Public Function Dec2Hex(ByVal DecNum As Long) As String
        Dim hexv As String, na As Long
        hexv = ""
        Do While DecNum > 0
            na = DecNum Mod 16
            Select Case na
                Case 10
                    hexv = "A" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 11
                    hexv = "B" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 12
                    hexv = "C" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 13
                    hexv = "D" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 14
                    hexv = "E" + Trim(hexv)
                Case 15
                    hexv = "F" + Trim(hexv)
                Case Else
                    hexv = Str(na) + Trim(hexv)
            End Select
            If DecNum >= 16 Then
                DecNum = Int(DecNum / 16)
            Else
                hexv = "0" + Trim(hexv)
                Exit Do
            End If
        Loop
        If Len(hexv) > 1 And (Len(hexv) Mod 2 = 1) Then
            Dec2Hex = Mid(hexv, 2)
        Else
            Dec2Hex = hexv
        End If
        If DecNum = 0 Then
            Dec2Hex = "00"
        End If
    End Function

    Public Function Hex2Asc(ByVal strHex As String) As String
        Dim intNum As Integer
        If strHex = "00" Then

        End If

    End Function

    Public Function NullCheck(ByVal strVal) As String
        Dim tmp As String
        Try
            tmp = strVal
        Catch ex As Exception
            tmp = ""
        End Try
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Public Function Asc2PrinterStr(ByVal str As String) As String

        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim RS As String = "_1e"
        Dim GS As String = "_1d"
        Dim EOT As String = "_04"
        If Len(str) > 2 Then
            For i As Integer = 1 To Len(str)
                If Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 4 Then 'EOT
                    tmp = tmp & EOT
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 30 Then 'RS
                    tmp = tmp & RS
                ElseIf Asc(Mid(str, i, 1)) = 29 Then 'GS
                    tmp = tmp & GS
                Else
                    tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
                End If
            Next
        Else
        End If
        If tmp = "" Then
        Else
            tmp = "#" & tmp
        End If
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckPing(ByVal strAddress As String) As Boolean

        Dim tmp As Boolean = False
        Try
            tmp = My.Computer.Network.Ping(strAddress)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
        Return tmp

    End Function

    Function CheckFolder(ByVal folder As String) As Boolean

        Try
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
            Return System.IO.Directory.Exists(folder)
        End Try

    End Function

    Function CheckFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String) As Boolean
        Return System.IO.File.Exists(folder & "\" & file)
    End Function

    Sub MakeFolder(ByVal folder As String)
        Try
            System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory(folder)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub WriteFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal file As String, ByVal str As String)
        Try
            Using f As New StreamWriter(folder & "\" & file, True)
                f.WriteLine(str)
            End Using
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Sub MakeFile(ByVal folder As String, ByVal File As String)
        Try
            System.IO.File.Create(folder & "\" & File)
        Catch ex As Exception
        End Try
    End Sub

    Public tmpFileName As String

    Public Sub WriteLog(ByVal strMsg As String, ByVal strType As String)

        Dim flagSave = True
        Dim tmpLogFolder As String = System.AppDomain.CurrentDomain.BaseDirectory & "\Log\" & Format(Now, "yyyy") & "\" & Format(Now, "MM") & "\" & Format(Now, "dd")
        Dim Tmpdtp As String = Format(Now, "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss") & vbTab
        Dim SaveStep As Integer = 0

        Do
            Try
                If SaveStep = 0 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = False Then
                        MakeFolder(tmpLogFolder)
                        SaveStep = 1
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 1
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 1 Then
                    If CheckFolder(tmpLogFolder) = True Then
                        SaveStep = 2
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 2 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = False Then
                        MakeFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt")
                        SaveStep = 3
                    Else
                        SaveStep = 3
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 3 Then
                    If CheckFile(tmpLogFolder, "\" & strType & ".txt") = True Then
                        SaveStep = 4
                    End If
                ElseIf SaveStep = 4 Then
                    WriteFile(tmpLogFolder, strType & ".txt", Tmpdtp & strMsg)
                    Exit Do
                End If
            Catch ex As Exception
                Exit Do
            End Try
            Application.DoEvents()
        Loop

    End Sub

    Public Sub ExecuteQurryMDB(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenMDB()
        Try
            MdbConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            'MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseMDB()

    End Sub

    Public Sub ExecuteQurrySQL(ByVal strQurry As String)

        Dim strSQL As String = ""
        ConnectionOpenSQL()
        Try
            SqlConnect.Execute(strQurry)
        Catch ex As Exception
            MsgBox(ex.ToString)
        End Try
        ConnectionCloseSQL()

    End Sub

    Public Function DeleteSpace(ByVal str As String) As String
        Dim tmp As String = ""
        Dim i As Integer
        For i = 1 To Len(str)
            If Mid(str, i, 1) = " " Then
            Else
                tmp = tmp & Mid(str, i, 1)
            End If
        Next
        tmp = tmp
        Return tmp
    End Function

    Public Class HiResTimer

        Private isPerfCounterSupported As Boolean = False
        Private timerFrequency As Int64 = 0
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceCounter Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short
        Declare Function QueryPerformanceFrequency Lib "Kernel32" (ByRef X As Long) As Short

        Public Sub New()
            Dim returnVal As Integer = QueryPerformanceFrequency(timerFrequency)
            If returnVal <> 0 AndAlso timerFrequency <> 1000 Then
                isPerfCounterSupported = True
            Else
                timerFrequency = 1000
            End If
        End Sub

        Public ReadOnly Property Frequency() As Int64
            Get
                Return timerFrequency
            End Get
        End Property

        Public ReadOnly Property Value() As Int64
            Get
                Dim tickCount As Int64 = 0

                If isPerfCounterSupported Then
                    QueryPerformanceCounter(tickCount)
                    Return tickCount
                Else
                    Return CType(Environment.TickCount, Int64)
                End If
            End Get
        End Property

    End Class

    Public Function Hex2Bin(ByVal sHex As String) As String
        Dim sBin As String
        sBin = ""
        If Len(sHex) > 2 Then
            sHex = UCase(sHex)
            If Left(sHex, 2) = "&H" Then
                Dim iHex As Integer, jHex As Integer
                Dim cHex As String
                Dim HBi As Integer
                Dim HBin As String
                sHex = Mid(sHex, 3)
                For HBi = 1 To Len(sHex)
                    cHex = Mid(sHex, HBi, 1)
                    Select Case cHex
                        Case "A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"
                            iHex = Asc(cHex) - 55
                        Case Else
                            iHex = Val(cHex)
                    End Select
                    HBin = ""
                    jHex = 8
                    For HBj = 1 To 4
                        If iHex >= jHex Then
                            HBin = HBin & "1"
                            iHex = iHex - jHex
                        Else
                            HBin = HBin & "0"
                        End If
                        jHex = jHex / 2
                    Next
                    sBin = sBin & HBin
                Next
            End If
        End If
        Return sBin
    End Function

    Public Function Bin2Hex(ByVal sBin As String)
        Dim sHex As String
        Dim lenBin As Integer
        sHex = ""
        lenBin = Len(sBin)
        If lenBin > 0 Then
            Dim splitLen As Integer
            Dim splitBin As String
            Dim iBin As Integer
            Dim jBin As Integer
            If lenBin Mod 4 <> 0 Then
                For BHi = 1 To 4 - (lenBin Mod 4)
                    sBin = "0" & sBin
                Next
            End If
            lenBin = Len(sBin)
            splitLen = lenBin / 4
            For BHi = 1 To splitLen
                splitBin = Mid(sBin, ((BHi - 1) * 4) + 1, 4)
                jBin = 8
                iBin = 0
                For BHj = 1 To 4
                    If Mid(splitBin, BHj, 1) = "1" Then
                        iBin = iBin + jBin
                    End If
                    jBin = jBin / 2
                Next
                sHex = sHex & Hex(iBin)
            Next
        End If
        Return sHex

    End Function

End Module
